title: Is s2O4 an altitude radial model of spreading/dispersion?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Like from Sinai centered and high up, to lower ground level radially spread out and dispersing
body: Like from Sinai centered and high up, to lower ground level radially spread out and dispersing
